## Summary

What problem does this solve, and what is the smallest chosen solution?

## Verification

List the exact checks and any manual behavior you verified.

## Boundaries

Note security, permissions, credentials, compatibility, release, or durable-data
effects. Write “none” when none apply.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and the diff contains no secrets or local-machine paths.
- [ ] Behavioral changes include focused tests where practical.
- [ ] Current documentation matches any changed command, capability, or boundary.
- [ ] Generated files were regenerated from their source.
- [ ] The strongest relevant checks pass.
